metadata.title: Legal & Privacy | Javed Viaggi
metadata.description: Legal information and privacy policy for Javed Viaggi.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This Privacy Policy describes how Javed Group collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: We collect information voluntarily provided through contact forms, such as name, email, and phone number, in order to respond to your requests for consultation.

sections.title: 2. Use of Data
sections.content: The collected data is used exclusively for administrative purposes and to provide the requested services.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: These legal notes govern access to and use of the Javed Group website.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this site is the exclusive property of Javed Group or its respective licensors.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.subtitle: Information on the use of cookies in compliance with current directives.

sections.title: What are cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that websites visited by users send to their terminals, where they are stored to be retransmitted to the same sites at the next visit.
